prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 1.5L PE-VPS (Skyactiv-G) with a forged internals build featuring Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft kit for high-RPM stability and 220+ hp at 8,000 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by Racing Beat, and a Pettit Racing intercooler core for 12 psi of boost with minimal heat soak.

Drivetrain: Install a OS Giken Super Lock LSD with 4.10 final drive gears (FD3S RX-7 donor) and a PPG 6-speed close-ratio gearset (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.08, 3rd: 1.57, 4th: 1.22, 5th: 1.00, 6th: 0.82) to handle the increased torque. Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for launch control compatibility.

Suspension/Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs, custom-valved for the RF’s targa roof stiffness. Add Cusco front strut tower bar (2-point, 3mm thick) and a Hardrace 3-point rear subframe brace. Fit 245/40R17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +30 front, 17x10 +35 rear) with custom 5x114.3 to 4x100 hubcentric spacers by 5Zigen.
estetica: Aero: Full Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (ND RF-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Pair with a custom 3D-printed diffuser by Maxton Design, featuring integrated LED brake cooling ducts. Front splitter must be reinforced with aluminum honeycomb core for rigidity.

Exterior: Full respray in Mazda Soul Red Crystal with XPEL Stealth PPF on high-impact areas (front bumper, mirrors, A-pillars). Replace the stock targa roof with a carbon fiber hardtop by Seibon, featuring a removable sunroof panel. Retrofit JDM-spec LED headlights with Morimoto HID projectors and sequential turn signals.

Interior: Full Recaro SP-G (ND-specific) seat swap with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses. Replace the stock steering wheel with a NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel and a Works Bell quick-release hub. Add a custom roll cage by Hard Dog Motorsports (bolt-in, 6-point, ND RF-specific) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline.
